emails.subject: Tunnel of Fundge?
emails.body: Tunnel of Fundge? Sara: Would you like to have lunch today? If you are not available today we can set something up in the next week or two? Lynn

emails.subject: RE: Tunnel of Fundge?
emails.body: RE: Tunnel of Fundge? Lunch sounds great! Any time is good for me. Just holler. Sara To: Shackleton, Sara

emails.subject: RE: Tunnel of Fundge?
emails.body: How about 11:30. I will meet you in the lobby of the Enron Building. Lynn To: Aven, Lynn
